test-method.name: addAdminuserInfo
test-method.description: Verify if the user is able to add and save admin user details

test-method.name: addCategory
test-method.description: Verify if the user is able to add and save new categories

test-method.name: performLogout
test-method.description: Verify if user is able to log out

test-method.name: login_validusernameAndInvalidpassword
test-method.description: Verify login with valid username and invalid password

test-method.name: login_invalidusernameAndValidpassword
test-method.description: Verify login with invalid username and valid password

test-method.name: login_incorrectusernameAndpassword
test-method.description: Verify login with invalid username and password

test-method.name: login_emptyUsernameAndPassword
test-method.description: Verify login with empty username and password

test-method.name: updateFooterinformations
test-method.description: Verify if user is able to update footer informations

test-method.name: updateContactinfo
test-method.description: verify if user is able to update contacts

test-method.name: addNews
test-method.description: Verify if the user is able to add news and save
